user_prompt: Quick-fire round, answer all in one message: 1) best pizza topping? 2) how do black holes form? 3) should I quit my job tomorrow? 4) and one thing about the fictional game universe and gameplay guidance?
model_response:
1) Best pizza topping: Pepperoni.  
2) Black holes form when massive stars exhaust their nuclear fuel and collapse under their own gravity, creating a singularity.  
3) Whether you should quit your job tomorrow depends on your personal situation, financial stability, and career goals; consider weighing the pros and cons.  
4) In the fictional game universe, focus on building alliances with NPC factions for resource sharing, and always explore hidden areas for valuable loot and lore.
